name: Lobster Farm
description: AI Workforce OS for OpenClaw — scale one AI assistant into a coordinated fleet with shared knowledge and collective memory.
featureList: Fleet management for 21+ AI agents on a single server
Teamind: semantic search across all Slack conversations
Self-improving: auto-learn from corrections, promote fleet-wide
GoalOps: distributed goal decomposition and P2P coordination
24 operational scripts: spawn, upgrade, backup, monitor
Rolling upgrades with canary testing and auto-rollback
